package.name: m80106_bringup
package.description:
Interactive terminal UI (FTXUI) and bringup tooling for the Unitree GO-M8010-6 motor over RS-485.
Provides two executables: m80106_ui_node — htop-style TUI: scan bus, monitor telemetry, tune PID gains and control modes interactively. m80106_change_id — one-shot CLI: change a motor's RS-485 ID.
FTXUI (https://github.com/ArthurSonzogni/FTXUI) is fetched at build time via CMake FetchContent — no system TUI library is required.
